Fixes the Settings page disappearing after the v1.0.9 logo fix.

## Fixed
- The ShipLog settings page is listed under **Settings** again. v1.0.9 lowercased
  the plugin name so Unraid would resolve the logo, name and description in the
  Plugins tab (the FanCtrlPlus way), but it left the page file as `ShipLog.page`
  and `launch="Settings/ShipLog"`. With the slug now lowercase, Unraid looked for
  `shiplog.page` and found none, so the settings entry vanished. The page is now
  `shiplog.page` with `launch="Settings/shiplog"` — everything consistent with the
  lowercase slug. The display name stays **ShipLog**.
